fields.name: display
fields.notes: If false, this ability does not show in unit stats.

fields.name: launchBlock
fields.notes: Core block that is launched. Should match the starting core of the planet being launched to.

fields.name: launchCandidates
fields.notes: Override for planets that this block can launch to. If null, the planet's launch candidates are used.

fields.name: color
fields.notes: Color of the shine. If null, uses team color.

fields.name: drawPlate
fields.notes: Whether to draw the plate region.

fields.name: drawShine
fields.notes: Whether to draw the shine over the plate region.

fields.name: activationTime
fields.notes: How much time to start shooting after placement.

fields.name: coolEffect
fields.notes: Effect displayed when coolant is used.

fields.name: coolantMultiplier
fields.notes: How much reload is lowered by for each unit of liquid of heat capacity.

fields.name: coolant
fields.notes: If not null, this consumer will be used for coolant.

fields.name: optionalBoostIntensity
fields.notes: How many times faster the drill will progress when boosted by an optional consumer.

fields.name: drillMultipliers
fields.notes: Multipliers of drill speed for each item. Defaults to 1.

fields.name: blockedItem
fields.notes: Special exemption item that this drill can't mine.

fields.name: blockedItems
fields.notes: Special exemption items that this drill can't mine.

fields.name: hasItems
fields.notes: If true, buildings have an ItemModule.

fields.name: hasLiquids
fields.notes: If true, buildings have a LiquidModule.

fields.name: hasPower
fields.notes: If true, buildings have a PowerModule.

fields.name: outputsLiquid
fields.notes: Flag for determining whether this block outputs liquid somewhere; used for connections.

fields.name: consumesPower
fields.notes: Used by certain power blocks (nodes) to flag as non-consuming of power. True by default, even if this block has no power.

fields.name: outputsPower
fields.notes: If true, this block is a generator that can produce power.

fields.name: connectedPower
fields.notes: If false, power nodes cannot connect to this block.

fields.name: conductivePower
fields.notes: If true, this block can conduct power like a cable.

fields.name: outputsPayload
fields.notes: If true, this block can output payloads; affects blending.

fields.name: acceptsUnitPayloads
fields.notes: If true, this block can input payloads; affects unit payload enter behavior.

fields.name: acceptsPayload
fields.notes: If true, payloads will attempt to move into this block.

fields.name: acceptsItems
fields.notes: Visual flag use for blending of certain transportation blocks.

fields.name: alwaysAllowDeposit
fields.notes: If true, this block won't be affected by the onlyDepositCore rule.

fields.name: depositCooldown
fields.notes: Cooldown, in seconds, applied to player item depositing when any item is deposited to this block. Overrides the itemDepositCooldown if non-negative.

fields.name: separateItemCapacity
fields.notes: If true, all item capacities of this block are separate instead of pooled as one number.

fields.name: itemCapacity
fields.notes: maximum items this block can carry (usually, this is per-type of item)

fields.name: liquidCapacity
fields.notes: maximum total liquids this block can carry if hasLiquids = true. Default value is 10, scales with max liquid consumption in ConsumeLiquid

fields.name: liquidPressure
fields.notes: higher numbers increase liquid output speed; TODO remove and replace with better liquids system

fields.name: outputFacing
fields.notes: If true, this block outputs to its facing direction, when applicable. Used for blending calculations.

fields.name: noSideBlend
fields.notes: if true, this block does not accept input from the sides (used for armored conveyors)

fields.name: displayFlow
fields.notes: whether to display flow rate

fields.name: inEditor
fields.notes: whether this block is visible in the editor

fields.name: editorConfigurable
fields.notes: if true, {@link #buildEditorConfig(Table)} will be called for configuring this block in the editor.

fields.name: lastConfig
fields.notes: the last configuration value applied to this block.

fields.name: saveConfig
fields.notes: whether to save the last config and apply it to newly placed blocks

fields.name: copyConfig
fields.notes: whether to allow copying the config through middle click

fields.name: clearOnDoubleTap
fields.notes: if true, double-tapping this configurable block clears configuration.

fields.name: update
fields.notes: whether this block has a tile entity that updates

fields.name: destructible
fields.notes: whether this block has health and can be destroyed. note that setting this to false does nothing if update = true!

fields.name: unloadable
fields.notes: whether unloaders work on this block

fields.name: isDuct
fields.notes: if true, this block acts a duct and will connect to armored ducts from the side.

fields.name: allowResupply
fields.notes: whether units can resupply by taking items from this block

fields.name: solid
fields.notes: whether this is solid

fields.name: solidifes
fields.notes: whether this block CAN be solid.

fields.name: teamPassable
fields.notes: if true, this counts as a non-solid block to this team.

fields.name: underBullets
fields.notes: if true, this block cannot be hit by bullets unless explicitly targeted.

fields.name: rotate
fields.notes: whether this is rotatable

fields.name: rotateDraw
fields.notes: if rotate is true and this is false, the region won't rotate when drawing

fields.name: rotateDrawEditor
fields.notes: if rotate is true and this is false, the region won't rotate when drawing in the editor

fields.name: visualRotationOffset
fields.notes: visual rotation offset used in broken plan rendering

fields.name: lockRotation
fields.notes: if rotate = false and this is true, rotation will be locked at 0 when placing (default); advanced use only

fields.name: ignoreLineRotation
fields.notes: if true, this block won't face the line drag direction

fields.name: invertFlip
fields.notes: if true, schematic flips with this block are inverted.

fields.name: variants
fields.notes: number of different variant regions to use

fields.name: drawArrow
fields.notes: whether to draw a rotation arrow - this does not apply to lines of blocks

fields.name: drawTeamOverlay
fields.notes: whether to draw the team corner by default

fields.name: saveData
fields.notes: for static blocks only: if true, tile data() is saved in world data.

fields.name: breakable
fields.notes: whether you can break this with rightclick

fields.name: unitMoveBreakable
fields.notes: if true, this block will be broken by certain units stepping/moving over it

fields.name: rebuildable
fields.notes: whether to add this block to brokenblocks

fields.name: privileged
fields.notes: if true, this logic-related block can only be used with privileged processors (or is one itself)

fields.name: requiresWater
fields.notes: whether this block can only be placed on water

fields.name: placeableLiquid
fields.notes: whether this block can be placed on any liquids, anywhere

fields.name: placeablePlayer
fields.notes: whether this block can be placed directly by the player via PlacementFragment

fields.name: placeableOn
fields.notes: whether this floor can be placed on.

fields.name: insulated
fields.notes: whether this block has insulating properties.

fields.name: squareSprite
fields.notes: whether the sprite is a full square.

fields.name: absorbLasers
fields.notes: whether this block absorbs laser attacks.

fields.name: enableDrawStatus
fields.notes: if false, the status is never drawn

fields.name: drawDisabled
fields.notes: whether to draw disabled status

fields.name: autoResetEnabled
fields.notes: whether to automatically reset enabled status after a logic block has not interacted for a while.

fields.name: noUpdateDisabled
fields.notes: if true, the block stops updating when disabled

fields.name: updateInUnits
fields.notes: if true, this block updates when it's a payload in a unit.

fields.name: alwaysUpdateInUnits
fields.notes: if true, this block updates in payloads in units regardless of the experimental game rule

fields.name: canPickup
fields.notes: if true, this block can be picked up in payloads

fields.name: deconstructDropAllLiquid
fields.notes: if false, only incinerable liquids are dropped when deconstructing; otherwise, all liquids are dropped.

fields.name: useColor
fields.notes: Whether to use this block's color in the minimap. Only used for overlays.

fields.name: itemDrop
fields.notes: item that drops from this block, used for drills

fields.name: playerUnmineable
fields.notes: if true, this block cannot be mined by players. useful for annoying things like sand.

fields.name: attributes
fields.notes: Array of affinities to certain things.

fields.name: scaledHealth
fields.notes: Health per square tile that this block occupies; essentially, this is multiplied by size * size. Overridden if health is > 0. If <0, the default is 40.

fields.name: health
fields.notes: building health; -1 to use scaledHealth

fields.name: armor
fields.notes: damage absorption, similar to unit armor

fields.name: baseExplosiveness
fields.notes: base block explosiveness

fields.name: explosivenessScale
fields.notes: scaling of explosiveness based on items/liquids

fields.name: flammabilityScale
fields.notes: scaling of explosion flammability based on items/liquids

fields.name: baseShake
fields.notes: base value for screen shake upon destruction

fields.name: destroyBullet
fields.notes: bullet that this block spawns when destroyed

fields.name: destroyBulletSameTeam
fields.notes: if true, destroyBullet is spawned on the block's team instead of Derelict team

fields.name: lightLiquid
fields.notes: liquid used for lighting

fields.name: drawCracks
fields.notes: whether cracks are drawn when this block is damaged

fields.name: createRubble
fields.notes: whether rubble is created when this block is destroyed

fields.name: floating
fields.notes: whether this block can be placed on edges of liquids.

fields.name: size
fields.notes: multiblock size

fields.name: offset
fields.notes: multiblock offset

fields.name: sizeOffset
fields.notes: offset for iteration (internal use only)

fields.name: clipSize
fields.notes: Clipping size of this block. Should be as large as the block will draw.

fields.name: lightClipSize
fields.notes: Clipping size for lights only.

fields.name: placeOverlapRange
fields.notes: When placeRangeCheck is enabled, this is the range checked for enemy blocks.

fields.name: crushDamageMultiplier
fields.notes: Multiplier of damage dealt to this block by tanks. Does not apply to crawlers.

fields.name: crushFragile
fields.notes: If true, this block is instantly destroyed by tanks with crushFragile set to true.

fields.name: timers
fields.notes: Max of timers used.

fields.name: cacheLayer
fields.notes: Cache layer. Only used for 'cached' rendering.

fields.name: fillsTile
fields.notes: Special flag; if false, floor will be drawn under this block even if it is cached.

fields.name: forceDark
fields.notes: If true, this block can be covered by darkness / fog even if synthetic.

fields.name: alwaysReplace
fields.notes: whether this block can be replaced in all cases

fields.name: replaceable
fields.notes: if false, this block can never be replaced.

fields.name: group
fields.notes: The block group. Unless {@link #canReplace} is overridden, blocks in the same group can replace each other.

fields.name: flags
fields.notes: List of block flags. Used for AI indexing.

fields.name: priority
fields.notes: Targeting priority of this block, as seen by enemies.

fields.name: unitCapModifier
fields.notes: How much this block affects the unit cap by. The block flags must contain unitModifier in order for this to work.

fields.name: configurable
fields.notes: Whether the block can be tapped and selected to configure.

fields.name: configureSound
fields.notes: Sound played when this block is configured.

fields.name: ignoreResizeConfig
fields.notes: If true, this block does not have pointConfig with a transform called on map resize.

fields.name: commandable
fields.notes: If true, this building can be selected like a unit when commanding.

fields.name: allowConfigInventory
fields.notes: If true, the building inventory can be shown with the config.

fields.name: selectionRows
fields.notes: Defines how large selection menus, such as that of sorters, should be.

fields.name: selectionColumns
fields.notes: Defines how large selection menus, such as that of sorters, should be.

fields.name: logicConfigurable
fields.notes: If true, this block can be configured by logic.

fields.name: delayLandingConfig
fields.notes: If true, configuration is delayed when playing the landing block buildup animation. This may be removed in the future!

fields.name: consumesTap
fields.notes: Whether this block consumes touchDown events when tapped.

fields.name: drawLiquidLight
fields.notes: Whether to draw the glow of the liquid for this block, if it has one.

fields.name: envRequired
fields.notes: Environmental flags that are all required for this block to function. 0 = any environment

fields.name: envEnabled
fields.notes: The environment flags that this block can function in. If the env matches any of these, it will be enabled.

fields.name: envDisabled
fields.notes: The environment flags that this block cannot function in. If the env matches any of these, it will be disabled.

fields.name: sync
fields.notes: Whether to periodically sync this block across the network.

fields.name: conveyorPlacement
fields.notes: Whether this block uses conveyor-type placement mode.

fields.name: allowDiagonal
fields.notes: If false, diagonal placement (ctrl) for this block is not allowed.

fields.name: swapDiagonalPlacement
fields.notes: Whether to swap the diagonal placement modes.

fields.name: allowRectanglePlacement
fields.notes: Whether to allow rectangular placement, as opposed to a line.

fields.name: schematicPriority
fields.notes: Build queue priority in schematics.

fields.name: mapColor
fields.notes: The color of this block when displayed on the minimap or map preview. Do not set manually! This is overridden when loading for most blocks.

fields.name: hasColor
fields.notes: Whether this block has a minimap color.

fields.name: targetable
fields.notes: Whether units target this block.

fields.name: attacks
fields.notes: If true, this block attacks and is considered a turret in the indexer. Building must implement Ranged.

fields.name: suppressable
fields.notes: If true, this block is mending-related and can be suppressed with special units/missiles.

fields.name: canOverdrive
fields.notes: Whether the overdrive core has any effect on this block.

fields.name: outlineColor
fields.notes: Outlined icon color.

fields.name: outlineIcon
fields.notes: Whether any icon region has an outline added.

fields.name: outlineRadius
fields.notes: Outline icon radius.

fields.name: outlinedIcon
fields.notes: Which of the icon regions gets the outline added. Uses last icon if <= 0.

fields.name: hasShadow
fields.notes: Whether this block has a shadow under it.

fields.name: customShadow
fields.notes: If true, a custom shadow (name-shadow) is drawn under this block.

fields.name: placePitchChange
fields.notes: Should the sound made when this block is built change in pitch.

fields.name: breakPitchChange
fields.notes: Should the sound made when this block is deconstructed change in pitch.

fields.name: placeSound
fields.notes: Sound made when this block is built.

fields.name: breakSound
fields.notes: Sound made when this block is deconstructed.

fields.name: destroySound
fields.notes: Sounds made when this block is destroyed.

fields.name: destroySoundVolume
fields.notes: Volume of destruction sound.

fields.name: destroyPitchMin
fields.notes: Range of destroy sound.

fields.name: destroyPitchMax
fields.notes: Range of destroy sound.

fields.name: albedo
fields.notes: How reflective this block is.

fields.name: lightColor
fields.notes: Environmental passive light color.

fields.name: emitLight
fields.notes: If true, drawLight() will be called for this block.

fields.name: obstructsLight
fields.notes: If true, this block obstructs light emitted by other blocks.

fields.name: lightRadius
fields.notes: Radius of the light emitted by this block.

fields.name: fogRadius
fields.notes: How much fog this block uncovers, in tiles. Cannot be dynamic. <= 0 to disable.

fields.name: ambientSound
fields.notes: The sound that this block makes while idle. Uses one sound loop for all blocks.

fields.name: ambientSoundVolume
fields.notes: Idle sound base volume.

fields.name: requirements
fields.notes: Cost of constructing this block.

fields.name: category
fields.notes: Category in place menu.

fields.name: buildTime
fields.notes: Time to build this block in ticks. If this value is <0, it is calculated dynamically.

fields.name: buildVisibility
fields.notes: Whether this block is visible and can currently be built.

fields.name: buildCostMultiplier
fields.notes: Multiplier for speed of building this block.

fields.name: deconstructThreshold
fields.notes: Build completion at which deconstruction finishes.

fields.name: instantDeconstruct
fields.notes: If true, this block deconstructs immediately. Instant deconstruction implies no resource refund.

fields.name: instantBuild
fields.notes: If true, this block constructs immediately. This implies no resource requirement, and ignores configs - do not use, this is for performance only!

fields.name: ignoreBuildDarkness
fields.notes: If true, this block can be placed even in "dark" areas. Only used for editor static walls.

fields.name: placeEffect
fields.notes: Effect for placing the block. Passes size as rotation.

fields.name: breakEffect
fields.notes: Effect for breaking the block. Passes size as rotation.

fields.name: destroyEffect
fields.notes: Effect for destroying the block.

fields.name: researchCostMultiplier
fields.notes: Multiplier for cost of research in tech tree.

fields.name: researchCostMultipliers
fields.notes: Cost multipliers per-item.

fields.name: researchCost
fields.notes: Override for research cost. Uses multipliers above and building requirements if not set.

fields.name: forceTeam
fields.notes: If set, all blocks will be forced to be this team.

fields.name: instantTransfer
fields.notes: Whether this block has instant transfer.

fields.name: quickRotate
fields.notes: Whether you can rotate this block after it is placed.

fields.name: allowDerelictRepair
fields.notes: If true, this derelict block can be repair by clicking it.

fields.name: subclass
fields.notes: Main subclass. Non-anonymous.

fields.name: selectScroll
fields.notes: Scroll position for certain blocks.

fields.name: buildType
fields.notes: Building that is created for this block. Initialized in init() via reflection. Set manually if modded.

fields.name: configurations
fields.notes: Configuration handlers by type.

fields.name: itemFilter
fields.notes: Consumption filters.

fields.name: liquidFilter
fields.notes: Consumption filters.

fields.name: consumers
fields.notes: Array of consumers used by this block. Only populated after init().

fields.name: optionalConsumers
fields.notes: Array of consumers used by this block. Only populated after init().

fields.name: nonOptionalConsumers
fields.notes: Array of consumers used by this block. Only populated after init().

fields.name: updateConsumers
fields.notes: Array of consumers used by this block. Only populated after init().

fields.name: hasConsumers
fields.notes: Set to true if this block has any consumers in its array.

fields.name: consPower
fields.notes: The single power consumer, if applicable.

fields.name: regionRotated1
fields.notes: Regions indexes from icons() that are rotated. If either of these is not -1, other regions won't be rotated in ConstructBlocks.

fields.name: regionRotated2
fields.notes: Regions indexes from icons() that are rotated. If either of these is not -1, other regions won't be rotated in ConstructBlocks.

fields.name: dumpTime
fields.notes: How often to try dumping items in ticks, e.g. 5 = 12 times/sec

fields.name: lifetime
fields.notes: Lifetime in ticks.

fields.name: lifeScaleRandMin
fields.notes: Min/max multipliers for lifetime applied to this bullet when spawned.

fields.name: lifeScaleRandMax
fields.notes: Min/max multipliers for lifetime applied to this bullet when spawned.

fields.name: speed
fields.notes: Speed in units/tick.

fields.name: velocityScaleRandMin
fields.notes: Min/max multipliers for velocity applied to this bullet when spawned.

fields.name: velocityScaleRandMax
fields.notes: Min/max multipliers for velocity applied to this bullet when spawned.

fields.name: damage
fields.notes: Direct damage dealt on hit.

fields.name: hitSize
fields.notes: Hitbox size.

fields.name: drawSize
fields.notes: Clipping hitbox.

fields.name: angleOffset
fields.notes: Angle offset applied to bullet when spawned each time.

fields.name: randomAngleOffset
fields.notes: Angle offset applied to bullet when spawned each time.

fields.name: drag
fields.notes: Drag as fraction of velocity.

fields.name: accel
fields.notes: Acceleration per frame.

fields.name: pierce
fields.notes: Whether to pierce units.

fields.name: pierceBuilding
fields.notes: Whether to pierce buildings.

fields.name: pierceCap
fields.notes: Maximum # of pierced objects.

fields.name: pierceDamageFactor
fields.notes: Multiplier of damage decreased per health pierced.

fields.name: maxDamageFraction
fields.notes: If positive, limits non-splash damage dealt to a fraction of the target's maximum health.

fields.name: removeAfterPierce
fields.notes: If false, this bullet isn't removed after pierceCap is exceeded. Expert usage only.

fields.name: laserAbsorb
fields.notes: For piercing lasers, setting this to true makes it get absorbed by plastanium walls.

fields.name: optimalLifeFract
fields.notes: Life fraction at which this bullet has the best range/damage/etc. Used for lasers and continuous turrets.

fields.name: layer
fields.notes: Z layer to drawn on.

fields.name: hitEffect
fields.notes: Effect shown on direct hit.

fields.name: despawnEffect
fields.notes: Effect shown when bullet despawns.

fields.name: shootEffect
fields.notes: Effect created when shooting.

fields.name: shootPattern
fields.notes: Pattern used to shoot this bullet. If null, uses turret's default pattern.

fields.name: chargeEffect
fields.notes: Effect created when charging starts; only usable in single-shot weapons with a firstShotDelay / shotDelay.

fields.name: smokeEffect
fields.notes: Extra smoke effect created when shooting.

fields.name: shootSound
fields.notes: Overrides the shoot sound in turrets if set. Does nothing in units, as they can't have multiple ammo types.

fields.name: hitSound
fields.notes: Sound made when hitting something or getting removed.

fields.name: despawnSound
fields.notes: Sound made when hitting something or getting removed.

fields.name: hitSoundPitch
fields.notes: Pitch of the sound made when hitting something

fields.name: hitSoundPitchRange
fields.notes: Pitch of the sound made when hitting something

fields.name: hitSoundVolume
fields.notes: Volume of the sound made when hitting something

fields.name: inaccuracy
fields.notes: Extra inaccuracy when firing.

fields.name: ammoMultiplier
fields.notes: How many bullets get created per ammo item/liquid.

fields.name: reloadMultiplier
fields.notes: Multiplied by turret reload speed to get final shoot speed.

fields.name: buildingDamageMultiplier
fields.notes: Multiplier of how much base damage is done to tiles.

fields.name: shieldDamageMultiplier
fields.notes: Multiplier of how much base damage is done to force shields.

fields.name: recoil
fields.notes: Recoil from shooter entities.

fields.name: killShooter
fields.notes: Whether to kill the shooter when this is shot. For suicide bombers.

fields.name: instantDisappear
fields.notes: Whether to instantly make the bullet disappear.

fields.name: splashDamage
fields.notes: Damage dealt in splash. 0 to disable.

fields.name: scaledSplashDamage
fields.notes: If true, splash damage is "correctly" affected by unit hitbox size. Used for projectiles that do not collide / have splash as their main source of damage.

fields.name: knockback
fields.notes: Knockback in velocity.

fields.name: impact
fields.notes: Should knockback follow the bullet's direction

fields.name: status
fields.notes: Status effect applied on hit.

fields.name: statusDuration
fields.notes: Intensity of applied status effect in terms of duration.

fields.name: targetBlocks
fields.notes: Turret only. If false, blocks will not be targeted.

fields.name: targetMissiles
fields.notes: Turret only. If false, missiles will not be targeted.

fields.name: collidesTiles
fields.notes: Whether this bullet type collides with tiles.

fields.name: collidesTeam
fields.notes: Whether this bullet type collides with tiles that are of the same team.

fields.name: collidesAir
fields.notes: Whether this bullet type collides with air/ground units.

fields.name: collidesGround
fields.notes: Whether this bullet type collides with air/ground units.

fields.name: collides
fields.notes: Whether this bullet types collides with anything at all.

fields.name: collideFloor
fields.notes: If true, this projectile collides with non-surface floors.

fields.name: collideTerrain
fields.notes: If true, this projectile collides with static walls

fields.name: keepVelocity
fields.notes: Whether velocity is inherited from the shooter.

fields.name: scaleLife
fields.notes: Whether to scale lifetime (not actually velocity!) to disappear at the target position. Used for artillery.

fields.name: hittable
fields.notes: Whether this bullet can be hit by point defense.

fields.name: reflectable
fields.notes: Whether this bullet can be reflected.

fields.name: absorbable
fields.notes: Whether this projectile can be absorbed by shields.

fields.name: ignoreSpawnAngle
fields.notes: If true, the angle param in create is ignored.

fields.name: createChance
fields.notes: Chance for this bullet to be created.

fields.name: maxRange
fields.notes: Bullet range positive override.

fields.name: rangeOverride
fields.notes: When > 0, overrides range even if smaller than base range.

fields.name: rangeChange
fields.notes: When used in a turret with multiple ammo types, this can be set to a non-zero value to influence range.

fields.name: extraRangeMargin
fields.notes: When used in turrets with limitRange() applied, this adds extra range to the bullets that extends past targeting range. Only particularly relevant in vanilla.

fields.name: range
fields.notes: Range initialized in init().

fields.name: minRangeChange
fields.notes: When used in a turret with multiple ammo types, this can be set to a non-zero value to influence minRange

fields.name: healPercent
fields.notes: % of block health healed *

fields.name: healAmount
fields.notes: flat amount of block health healed

fields.name: healSound
fields.notes: sound played when a block is healed

fields.name: healSoundVolume
fields.notes: volume of heal sound

fields.name: lifesteal
fields.notes: Fraction of bullet damage that heals that shooter.

fields.name: makeFire
fields.notes: Whether to make fire on impact

fields.name: hitUnder
fields.notes: Whether this bullet will always hit blocks under it.

fields.name: despawnHit
fields.notes: Whether to create hit effects on despawn. Forced to true if this bullet has any special effects like splash damage. Disable setDefaults to avoid override

fields.name: fragOnHit
fields.notes: If true, this bullet will create bullets when it hits anything

fields.name: fragOnDespawn
fields.notes: If true, this bullet will create bullets when it despawns

fields.name: fragOnAbsorb
fields.notes: If false, this bullet will not create frags when absorbed by a shield.

fields.name: pierceArmor
fields.notes: If true, unit armor is ignored in damage calculations.

fields.name: armorMultiplier
fields.notes: Multiplies the unit armor used in damage calculations. Used for armor weakness, armor piercing, and anti-armor.

fields.name: sticky
fields.notes: If true, the bullet will "stick" to enemies and get deactivated on collision.

fields.name: stickyExtraLifetime
fields.notes: Extra time added to bullet when it sticks to something.

fields.name: setDefaults
fields.notes: Whether status and despawnHit should automatically be set.

fields.name: hitShake
fields.notes: Amount of shaking produced when this bullet hits something or despawns.

fields.name: despawnShake
fields.notes: Amount of shaking produced when this bullet hits something or despawns.

fields.name: fragBullet
fields.notes: Bullet type that is created when this bullet expires.

fields.name: delayFrags
fields.notes: If true, frag bullets are delayed to the next frame. Fixes obscure bugs with piercing bullet types spawning frags immediately and screwing up the Damage temporary variables.

fields.name: fragRandomSpread
fields.notes: Degree spread range of fragmentation bullets.

fields.name: fragSpread
fields.notes: Uniform spread between each frag bullet in degrees.

fields.name: fragAngle
fields.notes: Angle offset of fragmentation bullets.

fields.name: fragBullets
fields.notes: Number of fragmentation bullets created.

fields.name: fragVelocityMin
fields.notes: Random range of frag velocity as a multiplier.

fields.name: fragVelocityMax
fields.notes: Random range of frag velocity as a multiplier.

fields.name: fragLifeMin
fields.notes: Random range of frag lifetime as a multiplier.

fields.name: fragLifeMax
fields.notes: Random range of frag lifetime as a multiplier.

fields.name: fragOffsetMin
fields.notes: Random offset of frag bullets from the parent bullet.

fields.name: fragOffsetMax
fields.notes: Random offset of frag bullets from the parent bullet.

fields.name: pierceFragCap
fields.notes: How many times this bullet can release frag bullets, if pierce = true.

fields.name: intervalBullet
fields.notes: Bullet that is created at a fixed interval.

fields.name: bulletInterval
fields.notes: Interval, in ticks, between which bullet spawn.

fields.name: intervalBullets
fields.notes: Number of bullet spawned per interval.

fields.name: intervalRandomSpread
fields.notes: Random angle added to interval bullets.

fields.name: intervalSpread
fields.notes: Angle spread between individual interval bullets.

fields.name: intervalAngle
fields.notes: Angle offset for interval bullets.

fields.name: intervalDelay
fields.notes: Use a negative value to disable interval bullet delay.

fields.name: underwater
fields.notes: If true, this bullet is rendered underwater. Highly experimental!

fields.name: hitColor
fields.notes: Color used for hit/despawn effects.

fields.name: healColor
fields.notes: Color used for block heal effects.

fields.name: healEffect
fields.notes: Effect emitted upon blocks that are healed.

fields.name: spawnBullets
fields.notes: Bullets spawned when this bullet is created. Rarely necessary, used for visuals.

fields.name: showStats
fields.notes: Whether to display the stats of the spawned bullet.

fields.name: spawnBulletRandomSpread
fields.notes: Random angle spread of spawn bullets.

fields.name: spawnUnit
fields.notes: Unit spawned instead of this bullet. Useful for missiles.

fields.name: despawnUnit
fields.notes: Unit spawned when this bullet hits something or despawns due to it hitting the end of its lifetime.

fields.name: despawnUnitChance
fields.notes: The chance for despawn units to spawn.

fields.name: despawnUnitCount
fields.notes: Amount of units spawned when this bullet despawns.

fields.name: despawnUnitRadius
fields.notes: Random offset distance from the original bullet despawn/hit coordinate.

fields.name: faceOutwards
fields.notes: If true, units spawned when this bullet despawns face away from the bullet instead of the same direction as the bullet.

fields.name: parts
fields.notes: Extra visual parts for this bullet.

fields.name: trailColor
fields.notes: Color of trail behind bullet.

fields.name: trailChance
fields.notes: Chance of trail effect spawning on bullet per tick.

fields.name: trailInterval
fields.notes: Uniform interval in which trail effect is spawned.

fields.name: trailMinVelocity
fields.notes: Min velocity required for trail effect to spawn.

fields.name: trailEffect
fields.notes: Trail effect that is spawned.

fields.name: trailSpread
fields.notes: Random offset of trail effect.

fields.name: trailParam
fields.notes: Rotation/size parameter that is passed to trail. Usually, this controls size.

fields.name: trailRotation
fields.notes: Whether the parameter passed to the trail is the bullet rotation, instead of a flat value.

fields.name: trailInterp
fields.notes: Interpolation for trail width as function of bullet lifetime

fields.name: trailLength
fields.notes: Length of trail quads. Any value <= 0 disables the trail.

fields.name: trailWidth
fields.notes: Width of trail, if trailLength > 0

fields.name: trailSinMag
fields.notes: If trailSinMag > 0, these values are applied as a sine curve to trail width.

fields.name: trailSinScl
fields.notes: If trailSinMag > 0, these values are applied as a sine curve to trail width.

fields.name: circleShooter
fields.notes: If true, the bullet will attempt to circle around its shooting entity.

fields.name: circleShooterRadius
fields.notes: Radius that the bullet attempts to circle at.

fields.name: circleShooterRadiusSmooth
fields.notes: Smooth extra radius value for circling.

fields.name: circleShooterRotateSpeed
fields.notes: Multiplier of speed that is used to adjust velocity when circling.

fields.name: splashDamageRadius
fields.notes: Use a negative value to disable splash damage.

fields.name: splashDamagePierce
fields.notes: If true, splash damage pierces through tiles.

fields.name: incendAmount
fields.notes: Amount of fires attempted around bullet.

fields.name: incendSpread
fields.notes: Spread of fires around bullet.

fields.name: incendChance
fields.notes: Chance of fire being created.

fields.name: homingPower
fields.notes: Power of bullet ability. Usually a number between 0 and 1; try 0.1 as a starting point.

fields.name: homingRange
fields.notes: Range of homing effect around bullet.

fields.name: homingDelay
fields.notes: Use a negative value to disable homing delay.

fields.name: followAimSpeed
fields.notes: Speed at which bullet rotates to follow cursor. <= 0 to disable.

fields.name: suppressionRange
fields.notes: Range of healing block suppression effect.

fields.name: suppressionDuration
fields.notes: Duration of healing block suppression effect.

fields.name: suppressionEffectChance
fields.notes: Chance of suppression effect occurring on block, scaled down by number of blocks.

fields.name: suppressColor
fields.notes: Color used for the regenSuppressSeek effect.

fields.name: lightningColor
fields.notes: Color of lightning created by bullet.

fields.name: lightning
fields.notes: Number of separate lightning "roots".

fields.name: lightningLength
fields.notes: Length of each lightning strand.

fields.name: lightningLengthRand
fields.notes: Extra random length added onto base length of lightning.

fields.name: lightningDamage
fields.notes: Use a negative value to use default bullet damage.

fields.name: lightningCone
fields.notes: Spread of lightning, relative to bullet rotation.

fields.name: lightningAngle
fields.notes: Offset of lightning relative to bullet rotation.

fields.name: lightningType
fields.notes: The bullet created at lightning points.

fields.name: weaveScale
fields.notes: Scale of bullet weave pattern. Higher -> less vibration.

fields.name: weaveMag
fields.notes: Intensity of bullet weaving. Note that this may make bullets inaccurate.

fields.name: weaveRandom
fields.notes: If true, the bullet weave will randomly switch directions on spawn.

fields.name: rotateSpeed
fields.notes: Rotation speed of the bullet velocity as it travels.

fields.name: puddles
fields.notes: Number of individual puddles created.

fields.name: puddleRange
fields.notes: Range of puddles around bullet position.

fields.name: puddleAmount
fields.notes: Liquid count of each puddle created.

fields.name: puddleLiquid
fields.notes: Liquid that puddles created are made of.

fields.name: displayAmmoMultiplier
fields.notes: Whether to display the ammo multiplayer for this bullet type in its stats.

fields.name: statLiquidConsumed
fields.notes: If >0, this is displayed divided by the ammo multiplier.

fields.name: lightRadius
fields.notes: Radius of light emitted by this bullet; <0 to use defaults.

fields.name: lightOpacity
fields.notes: Opacity of light color.

fields.name: lightColor
fields.notes: Color of light emitted by this bullet.

fields.name: rotateRegions
fields.notes: indices: [rotation] [fluid type] [frame]

fields.name: padCorners
fields.notes: If true, the liquid region is padded at corners, so it doesn't stick out.

fields.name: filter
fields.notes: Empty seq for no filter.

fields.name: itemDuration
fields.notes: The time in number of ticks during which a single item will produce power.

fields.name: explodeOnFull
fields.notes: If true, this block explodes when outputLiquid exceeds capacity.

fields.name: itemDurationMultipliers
fields.notes: Multiplies the itemDuration for a given item.

fields.name: timescaleDamage
fields.notes: If a building fired this, whether to multiply damage by its timescale.

fields.name: lengthWidthPans
fields.notes: Lengths, widths, ellipse panning, and offsets, all as fractions of the base width and length. Stored as an 'interleaved' array of values: LWPO1 LWPO2 LWPO3...

fields.name: aimChangeSpeed
fields.notes: Speed at which the turret can change its bullet "aim" distance. This is only used for point laser bullets.

fields.name: allowSpawn
fields.notes: If false, players can't respawn at this core.

fields.name: requiresCoreZone
fields.notes: If true, this core type requires a core zone to upgrade.

fields.name: frames
fields.notes: Number of frames to draw.

fields.name: interval
fields.notes: Ticks between frames.

fields.name: sine
fields.notes: If true, frames wil alternate back and forth in a sine wave.

fields.name: mixcol
fields.notes: If false, fades between emptyRegion and fullRegion instead of mixcol between empty and full colors.

fields.name: layer
fields.notes: Any number <=0 disables layer changes.

fields.name: name
fields.notes: If set, overrides the region name.

fields.name: layer
fields.notes: Any number <=0 disables layer changes.

fields.name: basePrefix
fields.notes: Prefix to use when loading base region.

fields.name: liquidDraw
fields.notes: Overrides the liquid to draw in the liquid region.

fields.name: tier
fields.notes: Maximum tier of blocks this drill can mine.

fields.name: drillTime
fields.notes: Base time to drill one ore, in frames.

fields.name: liquidBoostIntensity
fields.notes: How many times faster the drill will progress when boosted by liquid.

fields.name: warmupSpeed
fields.notes: Speed at which the drill speeds up.

fields.name: blockedItem
fields.notes: Special exemption item that this drill can't mine.

fields.name: blockedItems
fields.notes: Special exemption items that this drill can't mine.

fields.name: drawMineItem
fields.notes: Whether to draw the item this drill is mining.

fields.name: drillEffect
fields.notes: Effect played when an item is produced. This is colored.

fields.name: drillEffectRnd
fields.notes: Drill effect randomness. Block size by default.

fields.name: drillEffectChance
fields.notes: Chance of displaying the effect. Useful for extremely fast drills.

fields.name: rotateSpeed
fields.notes: Speed the drill bit rotates at.

fields.name: updateEffect
fields.notes: Effect randomly played while drilling.

fields.name: updateEffectChance
fields.notes: Chance the update effect will appear.

fields.name: drillMultipliers
fields.notes: Multipliers of drill speed for each item. Defaults to 1.

fields.name: clip
fields.notes: Clip size.

fields.name: startDelay
fields.notes: Time delay before the effect starts

fields.name: baseRotation
fields.notes: Amount added to rotation

fields.name: followParent
fields.notes: If true, parent unit is data are followed.

fields.name: rotWithParent
fields.notes: If this and followParent are true, the effect will offset and rotate with the parent's rotation.

fields.name: sameTypeHealMult
fields.notes: Multiplies healing to units of the same type by this amount.

fields.name: edge
fields.notes: edge fallback, used mainly for ores

fields.name: speedMultiplier
fields.notes: Multiplies unit velocity by this when walked on.

fields.name: dragMultiplier
fields.notes: Multiplies unit drag by this when walked on.

fields.name: damageTaken
fields.notes: Damage taken per tick on this tile.

fields.name: drownTime
fields.notes: How many ticks it takes to drown on this. 0 to disable.

fields.name: walkEffect
fields.notes: Effect when walking on this floor.

fields.name: walkSound
fields.notes: Sound made when walking.

fields.name: walkSoundVolume
fields.notes: Volume of sound made when walking.

fields.name: walkSoundPitchMin
fields.notes: Volume of sound made when walking.

fields.name: walkSoundPitchMax
fields.notes: Volume of sound made when walking.

fields.name: drownUpdateEffect
fields.notes: Effect displayed when drowning on this floor.

fields.name: status
fields.notes: Status effect applied when walking on.

fields.name: statusDuration
fields.notes: Intensity of applied status effect.

fields.name: liquidDrop
fields.notes: liquids that drop from this block, used for pumps.

fields.name: liquidMultiplier
fields.notes: Multiplier for pumped liquids, used for deep water.

fields.name: isLiquid
fields.notes: whether this block is liquid.

fields.name: overlayAlpha
fields.notes: for liquid floors, this is the opacity of the overlay drawn on top.

fields.name: supportsOverlay
fields.notes: whether this floor supports an overlay floor

fields.name: shallow
fields.notes: shallow water flag used for generation

fields.name: blendGroup
fields.notes: Group of blocks that this block does not draw edges on.

fields.name: oreDefault
fields.notes: Whether this ore generates in maps by default.

fields.name: oreScale
fields.notes: Ore generation params.

fields.name: oreThreshold
fields.notes: Ore generation params.

fields.name: wall
fields.notes: Wall variant of this block. May be Blocks.air if not found.

fields.name: decoration
fields.notes: Decoration block. Usually a rock. May be air.

fields.name: canShadow
fields.notes: Whether units can draw shadows over this.

fields.name: forceDrawLight
fields.notes: If true, this floor ignores the obstructsLight flag of overlays.

fields.name: needsSurface
fields.notes: Whether this overlay needs a surface to be on. False for floating blocks, like spawns.

fields.name: allowCorePlacement
fields.notes: If true, cores can be placed on this floor.

fields.name: wallOre
fields.notes: If true, this ore is allowed on walls.

fields.name: blendId
fields.notes: Actual ID used for blend groups. Internal.

fields.name: tilingVariants
fields.notes: If >0, this floor is drawn as parts of a large texture.

fields.name: autotile
fields.notes: If true, this floor uses autotiling; variants are not supported. See https://github.com/GglLfr/tile-gen

fields.name: autotileMidVariants
fields.notes: If >1, the middle region of the autotile has random variants.

fields.name: autotileVariants
fields.notes: Variants of the main autotile sprite.

fields.name: drawEdgeIn
fields.notes: If true (default), this floor will draw edges of other floors on itself.

fields.name: drawEdgeOut
fields.notes: If true (default), this floor will draw its edges onto other floors.

fields.name: radius
fields.notes: Shield radius.

fields.name: regen
fields.notes: Shield regen speed in damage/tick.

fields.name: max
fields.notes: Maximum shield.

fields.name: cooldown
fields.notes: Cooldown after the shield is broken, in ticks.

fields.name: sides
fields.notes: Sides of shield polygon.

fields.name: rotation
fields.notes: Rotation of shield.

fields.name: outputItem
fields.notes: Written to outputItems as a single-element array if outputItems is null.

fields.name: outputItems
fields.notes: Overwrites outputItem if not null.

fields.name: outputLiquid
fields.notes: Written to outputLiquids as a single-element array if outputLiquids is null.

fields.name: outputLiquids
fields.notes: Overwrites outputLiquid if not null.

fields.name: liquidOutputDirections
fields.notes: Liquid output directions, specified in the same order as outputLiquids. Use -1 to dump in every direction. Rotations are relative to block.

fields.name: dumpExtraLiquid
fields.notes: if true, crafters with multiple liquid outputs will dump excess when there's still space for at least one liquid type

fields.name: legacyReadWarmup
fields.notes: Only used for legacy cultivator blocks.

fields.name: heatRequirement
fields.notes: Base heat requirement for 100% efficiency.

fields.name: overheatScale
fields.notes: After heat meets this requirement, excess heat will be scaled by this number.

fields.name: maxEfficiency
fields.notes: Maximum possible efficiency after overheat.

fields.name: explosiveness
fields.notes: how explosive this item is.

fields.name: flammability
fields.notes: flammability above 0.3 makes this eligible for item burners.

fields.name: radioactivity
fields.notes: how radioactive this item is.

fields.name: charge
fields.notes: how electrically potent this item is.

fields.name: hardness
fields.notes: drill hardness of the item

fields.name: cost
fields.notes: base material cost of this item, used for calculating place times 1 cost = 1 tick added to build time

fields.name: healthScaling
fields.notes: When this item is present in the build cost, a block's default health is multiplied by 1 + scaling, where 'scaling' is summed together for all item requirement types.

fields.name: lowPriority
fields.notes: if true, this item is of the lowest priority to drills.

fields.name: frames
fields.notes: If >0, this item is animated.

fields.name: transitionFrames
fields.notes: Number of generated transition frames between each frame

fields.name: frameTime
fields.notes: Ticks in-between animation frames.

fields.name: buildable
fields.notes: If true, this material is used by buildings. If false, this material will be incinerated in certain cores.

fields.name: launchTime
fields.notes: Time between launches.

fields.name: gas
fields.notes: If true, this fluid is treated as a gas (and does not create puddles)

fields.name: color
fields.notes: Color used in pipes and on the ground.

fields.name: gasColor
fields.notes: Color of this liquid in gas form.

fields.name: barColor
fields.notes: Color used in bars.

fields.name: lightColor
fields.notes: Color used to draw lights. Note that the alpha channel is used to dictate brightness.

fields.name: flammability
fields.notes: 0-1, 0 is completely not flammable, anything above that may catch fire when exposed to heat, 0.5+ is very flammable.

fields.name: temperature
fields.notes: temperature: 0.5 is 'room' temperature, 0 is very cold, 1 is molten hot

fields.name: heatCapacity
fields.notes: how much heat this liquid can store. 0.4=water (decent), anything lower is probably less dense and bad at cooling.

fields.name: viscosity
fields.notes: how thick this liquid is. 0.5=water (relatively viscous), 1 would be something like tar (very slow).

fields.name: explosiveness
fields.notes: how prone to exploding this liquid is, when heated. 0 = nothing, 1 = nuke

fields.name: blockReactive
fields.notes: whether this fluid reacts in blocks at all (e.g. slag with water)

fields.name: coolant
fields.notes: if false, this liquid cannot be a coolant

fields.name: moveThroughBlocks
fields.notes: if true, this liquid can move through blocks as a puddle.

fields.name: incinerable
fields.notes: if true, this liquid can be incinerated in the incinerator block.

fields.name: effect
fields.notes: The associated status effect.

fields.name: particleEffect
fields.notes: Effect shown in puddles.

fields.name: particleSpacing
fields.notes: Particle effect rate spacing in ticks.

fields.name: boilPoint
fields.notes: Temperature at which this liquid vaporizes. This isn't just boiling.

fields.name: capPuddles
fields.notes: If true, puddle size is capped.

fields.name: vaporEffect
fields.notes: Effect when this liquid vaporizes.

fields.name: hidden
fields.notes: If true, this liquid is hidden in most UI.

fields.name: canStayOn
fields.notes: Liquids this puddle can stay on, e.g. oil on water.

fields.name: damage
fields.notes: Lightning damage

fields.name: chance
fields.notes: Chance of firing every tick. Set >= 1 to always fire lightning every tick at max speed

fields.name: length
fields.notes: Length of the lightning. <= 0 to disable

fields.name: minSpeed
fields.notes: Speeds for when to start lightninging and when to stop getting faster

fields.name: maxSpeed
fields.notes: Speeds for when to start lightninging and when to stop getting faster

fields.name: color
fields.notes: Lightning color

fields.name: y
fields.notes: Shifts where the lightning spawns along the Y axis

fields.name: x
fields.notes: Offset along the X axis

fields.name: alternate
fields.notes: Whether the spawn side alternates

fields.name: heatRegion
fields.notes: Jittering heat sprite like the shield on v5 Javelin

fields.name: bullet
fields.notes: Bullet type that is fired. Can be null

fields.name: bulletAngle
fields.notes: Bullet angle parameters

fields.name: bulletSpread
fields.notes: Bullet angle parameters

fields.name: repeat
fields.notes: Amount of times the bullet array is repeated.

fields.name: itemDuration
fields.notes: ticks to consume 1 fuel

fields.name: heating
fields.notes: heating per frame * fullness

fields.name: heatOutput
fields.notes: max heat this block can output

fields.name: heatWarmupRate
fields.notes: rate at which heat progress increases

fields.name: ambientCooldownTime
fields.notes: time taken to cool down if no fuel is inputted even if coolant is not present

fields.name: smokeThreshold
fields.notes: threshold at which block starts smoking

fields.name: flashThreshold
fields.notes: heat threshold at which lights start flashing

fields.name: coolantPower
fields.notes: heat removed per unit of coolant

fields.name: casingFlip
fields.notes: Gives the effect flipping compatability like casing effects.

fields.name: interp
fields.notes: Particle size/length/radius interpolation.

fields.name: sizeInterp
fields.notes: Particle size interpolation. Null to use interp.

fields.name: spin
fields.notes: Spin in degrees per tick.

fields.name: sizeFrom
fields.notes: Controls the initial and final sprite sizes.

fields.name: sizeTo
fields.notes: Controls the initial and final sprite sizes.

fields.name: sizeChangeStart
fields.notes: Controls the amount of ticks the effect waits before changing size.

fields.name: useRotation
fields.notes: Whether the rotation adds with the parent

fields.name: offset
fields.notes: Rotation offset.

fields.name: region
fields.notes: Sprite to draw.

fields.name: powerProduction
fields.notes: The amount of power produced per tick in case of an efficiency of 1.0, which represents 100%.

fields.name: pumpAmount
fields.notes: Pump amount per tile.

fields.name: consumeTime
fields.notes: Interval in-between item consumptions, if applicable.

fields.name: splashes
fields.defaultValue: [null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null]

fields.name: percentAmount
fields.notes: Amount healed as percent per tick.

fields.name: amount
fields.notes: Amount healed as a flat amount per tick.

fields.name: sameTypeHealMult
fields.notes: Multiplies healing to units of the same type by this amount.

fields.name: coolEffect
fields.notes: Effect displayed when coolant is used.

fields.name: coolantMultiplier
fields.notes: How much healing is increased by with heat capacity.

fields.name: difficulty
fields.notes: Difficulty, 0-10.

fields.name: isLastSector
fields.notes: If true, this is the last sector in its planetary campaign.

fields.name: requireUnlock
fields.notes: If true, this sector must be unlocked before landing is permitted.

fields.name: showHidden
fields.notes: If true, the icon and name is shown, even when it's a 'hidden' always-unlocked sector. TODO: this field may be changed, not sure how it should work

fields.name: overrideLaunchDefaults
fields.notes: If true, uses this sector's launch fields instead

fields.name: allowLaunchSchematics
fields.notes: Whether to allow users to specify a custom launch schematic for this map.

fields.name: allowLaunchLoadout
fields.notes: Whether to allow users to specify the resources they take to this map.

fields.name: attackAfterWaves
fields.notes: If true, switches to attack mode after waves end.

fields.name: originalPosition
fields.notes: The original position of this sector; used for migration. Internal use for vanilla campaign only!

fields.name: shieldSectors
fields.notes: Sectors that prevent this sector from being landed on until they are completed.

fields.name: radius
fields.notes: Shield radius.

fields.name: regen
fields.notes: Shield regen speed in damage/tick.

fields.name: max
fields.notes: Maximum shield.

fields.name: cooldown
fields.notes: Cooldown after the shield is broken, in ticks.

fields.name: angle
fields.notes: Angle of shield arc.

fields.name: angleOffset
fields.notes: Offset parameters for shield.

fields.name: x
fields.notes: Offset parameters for shield.

fields.name: y
fields.notes: Offset parameters for shield.

fields.name: whenShooting
fields.notes: If true, only activates when shooting.

fields.name: width
fields.notes: Width of shield line.

fields.name: chanceDeflect
fields.notes: Bullet deflection chance. -1 to disable

fields.name: reflectBuildingDamage
fields.notes: Multiplier for reflected bullet building damage. -1 to disable

fields.name: reflectVel
fields.notes: Velocity multiplier for reflected bullets on the opposite axis. Negative values = concave, positive values = convex

fields.name: reflectTime
fields.notes: Time multiplier for reflected bullets.

fields.name: deflectSound
fields.notes: Deflection sound.

fields.name: missileUnitMultiplier
fields.notes: Multiplier for shield damage taken from missile units.

fields.name: drawArc
fields.notes: Whether to draw the arc line.

fields.name: region
fields.notes: If not null, will be drawn on top.

fields.name: color
fields.notes: Color override of the shield. Uses unit shield colour by default.

fields.name: offsetRegion
fields.notes: If true, sprite position will be influenced by x/y.

fields.name: pushUnits
fields.notes: If true, enemy units are pushed out.

fields.name: attribute
fields.notes: Attribute that is checked when calculating output.

fields.name: spread
fields.notes: Random spread of units away from the spawned.

fields.name: faceOutwards
fields.notes: If true, units spawned face outwards from the middle.

fields.name: glowRegion
fields.notes: requires power to work properly

fields.name: recharge
fields.notes: (minimum) amount of loading docks needed to fill a line.

fields.name: autotile
fields.notes: If true, this wall uses autotiling; variants are not supported. See https://github.com/GglLfr/tile-gen

fields.name: autotileMidVariants
fields.notes: If >1, the middle region of the autotile has random variants.

fields.name: damageMultiplier
fields.notes: Damage dealt by the unit with the effect.

fields.name: healthMultiplier
fields.notes: Unit health multiplier.

fields.name: speedMultiplier
fields.notes: Unit speed multiplier.

fields.name: reloadMultiplier
fields.notes: Unit reload multiplier.

fields.name: buildSpeedMultiplier
fields.notes: Unit build speed multiplier.

fields.name: dragMultiplier
fields.notes: Unit drag multiplier.

fields.name: transitionDamage
fields.notes: Damage dealt upon transition to an affinity.

fields.name: disarm
fields.notes: Unit weapon(s) disabled.

fields.name: damage
fields.notes: Damage per frame.

fields.name: intervalDamageTime
fields.notes: Spacing (in ticks) between interval damage. <=0 to disable.

fields.name: intervalDamage
fields.notes: Damage dealt by interval damage.

fields.name: intervalDamagePierce
fields.notes: If true, interval damage is armor piercing.

fields.name: effectChance
fields.notes: Chance of effect appearing.

fields.name: parentizeEffect
fields.notes: Should the effect be given a parent.

fields.name: permanent
fields.notes: If true, the effect never disappears.

fields.name: reactive
fields.notes: If true, this effect will only react with other effects and cannot be applied.

fields.name: dynamic
fields.notes: Special flag for the dynamic effect type with custom stats - do not use.

fields.name: show
fields.notes: Whether to show this effect in the database.

fields.name: color
fields.notes: Tint color of effect.

fields.name: effect
fields.notes: Effect that happens randomly on top of the affected unit.

fields.name: applyEffect
fields.notes: Effect that is displayed once when applied to a unit.

fields.name: applyExtend
fields.notes: Whether the apply effect should display even if effect is already on the unit.

fields.name: applyColor
fields.notes: Tint color of apply effect.

fields.name: parentizeApplyEffect
fields.notes: Should the apply effect be given a parent.

fields.name: affinities
fields.notes: Affinity & opposite values for stat displays.

fields.name: opposites
fields.notes: Affinity & opposite values for stat displays.

fields.name: outline
fields.notes: Set to false to disable outline generation.

fields.name: targetInterval
fields.notes: Ticks between attempt at finding a target.

fields.name: newTargetInterval
fields.notes: Target interval for when this turret already has a valid target. -1 = targetInterval

fields.name: maxAmmo
fields.notes: Maximum ammo units stored.

fields.name: ammoPerShot
fields.notes: Ammo units used per shot.

fields.name: consumeAmmoOnce
fields.notes: If true, ammo is only consumed once per shot regardless of bullet count.

fields.name: heatRequirement
fields.notes: Minimum input heat required to fire.

fields.name: maxHeatEfficiency
fields.notes: Maximum efficiency possible, if this turret uses heat.

fields.name: inaccuracy
fields.notes: Bullet angle randomness in degrees.

fields.name: velocityRnd
fields.notes: Fraction of bullet velocity that is random.

fields.name: scaleLifetimeOffset
fields.notes: Fraction of lifetime that is added to bullets with lifeScale.

fields.name: shootCone
fields.notes: Maximum angle difference in degrees at which turret will still try to shoot.

fields.name: shootX
fields.notes: Turret shoot point.

fields.name: shootY
fields.notes: Turret shoot point.

fields.name: xRand
fields.notes: Random spread on the X axis.

fields.name: drawMinRange
fields.notes: If true, a range ring is also drawn for minRange.

fields.name: trackingRange
fields.notes: Range at which it finds and locks on to the target, but does not shoot.

fields.name: minRange
fields.notes: Minimum bullet range. Used for artillery only.

fields.name: minWarmup
fields.notes: Minimum warmup needed to fire.

fields.name: accurateDelay
fields.notes: If true, this turret will accurately target moving targets with respect to shoot.firstShotDelay.

fields.name: moveWhileCharging
fields.notes: If false, this turret can't move while charging.

fields.name: reloadWhileCharging
fields.notes: If false, this turret can't reload while charging

fields.name: warmupMaintainTime
fields.notes: How long warmup is maintained even if this turret isn't shooting.

fields.name: shoot
fields.notes: pattern used for bullets

fields.name: targetAir
fields.notes: If true, this block targets air units.

fields.name: targetGround
fields.notes: If true, this block targets ground units and structures.

fields.name: targetBlocks
fields.notes: If true, this block targets blocks.

fields.name: targetHealing
fields.notes: If true, this block targets friend blocks, to heal them.

fields.name: playerControllable
fields.notes: If true, this turret can be controlled by players.

fields.name: displayAmmoMultiplier
fields.notes: If true, this block will display ammo multipliers in its stats (irrelevant for certain types of turrets).

fields.name: targetUnderBlocks
fields.notes: If false, 'under' blocks like conveyors are not targeted.

fields.name: alwaysShooting
fields.notes: If true, the turret will always shoot when it has ammo, regardless of targets in range or any control.

fields.name: predictTarget
fields.notes: Whether this turret predicts unit movement.

fields.name: unitSort
fields.notes: Function for choosing which unit to target.

fields.name: unitFilter
fields.notes: Filter for types of units to attack.

fields.name: buildingFilter
fields.notes: Filter for types of buildings to attack.

fields.name: heatColor
fields.notes: Color of heat region drawn on top (if found)

fields.name: shootEffect
fields.notes: Optional override for all shoot effects.

fields.name: smokeEffect
fields.notes: Optional override for all smoke effects.

fields.name: ammoUseEffect
fields.notes: Effect created when ammo is used. Not optional.

fields.name: shootSound
fields.notes: Sound emitted when a single bullet is shot.

fields.name: shootSoundVolume
fields.notes: Volume of shooting sound.

fields.name: chargeSound
fields.notes: Sound emitted when shoot.firstShotDelay is >0 and shooting begins.

fields.name: loopSound
fields.notes: The sound that this block makes while active. One sound loop. Do not overuse.

fields.name: loopSoundVolume
fields.notes: Active sound base volume.

fields.name: soundPitchMin
fields.notes: Range for pitch of shoot sound.

fields.name: soundPitchMax
fields.notes: Range for pitch of shoot sound.

fields.name: ammoEjectBack
fields.notes: Backwards Y offset of ammo eject effect.

fields.name: shootWarmupSpeed
fields.notes: Lerp speed of turret warmup.

fields.name: linearWarmup
fields.notes: If true, turret warmup is linear instead of a curve.

fields.name: recoil
fields.notes: Visual amount by which the turret recoils back per shot.

fields.name: recoils
fields.notes: Number of additional counters for recoil.

fields.name: recoilTime
fields.notes: ticks taken for turret to return to starting position in ticks. uses reload time by default

fields.name: recoilPow
fields.notes: power curve applied to visual recoil

fields.name: cooldownTime
fields.notes: ticks to cool down the heat region

fields.name: elevation
fields.notes: Visual elevation of turret shadow, -1 to use defaults.

fields.name: shake
fields.notes: How much the screen shakes per shot.

fields.name: drawer
fields.notes: Defines drawing behavior for this turret.

fields.name: staleTimeDuration
fields.notes: If a block is full for this amount of time, it will not be flown to anymore.

fields.name: envRequired
fields.notes: Environmental flags that are all required for this unit to function. 0 = any environment

fields.name: envEnabled
fields.notes: The environment flags that this unit can function in. If the env matches any of these, it will be enabled.

fields.name: envDisabled
fields.notes: The environment flags that this unit cannot function in. If the env matches any of these, it will explode or be disabled.

fields.name: speed
fields.notes: movement speed (world units/t)

fields.name: boostMultiplier
fields.notes: multiplier for speed when boosting

fields.name: floorMultiplier
fields.notes: how affected this unit is by terrain

fields.name: rotateSpeed
fields.notes: body rotation speed in degrees/t

fields.name: baseRotateSpeed
fields.notes: mech base rotation speed in degrees/t

fields.name: drag
fields.notes: movement drag as fraction

fields.name: accel
fields.notes: acceleration as fraction of speed

fields.name: hitSize
fields.notes: size of one side of the hitbox square

fields.name: deathShake
fields.notes: shake on unit death

fields.name: stepShake
fields.notes: shake on each step for leg/mech units

fields.name: rippleScale
fields.notes: ripple / dust size for legged units

fields.name: riseSpeed
fields.notes: boosting rise speed as fraction

fields.name: descentSpeed
fields.notes: boosting descent speed as fraction

fields.name: fallSpeed
fields.notes: how fast this unit falls upon death

fields.name: missileAccelTime
fields.notes: how many ticks it takes this missile to accelerate to full speed

fields.name: health
fields.notes: raw health amount

fields.name: armor
fields.notes: incoming damage is reduced by this amount

fields.name: range
fields.notes: minimum range of any weapon; used for approaching targets. can be overridden by setting a value > 0.

fields.name: maxRange
fields.notes: maximum range of any weapon

fields.name: mineRange
fields.notes: range at which this unit can mine ores

fields.name: buildRange
fields.notes: range at which this unit can build

fields.name: circleTargetRadius
fields.notes: radius for circleTarget, if true

fields.name: crashDamageMultiplier
fields.notes: multiplier for damage this (flying) unit deals when crashing on enemy things

fields.name: wreckHealthMultiplier
fields.notes: multiplier for health that this flying unit has for its wreck, based on its max health.

fields.name: dpsEstimate
fields.notes: a VERY ROUGH estimate of unit DPS; initialized in init()

fields.name: clipSize
fields.notes: graphics clipping size; <0 to calculate automatically

fields.name: drownTimeMultiplier
fields.notes: multiplier for how slowly this unit drowns - higher numbers, slower drowning.

fields.name: strafePenalty
fields.notes: fractional movement speed penalty for this unit when it is moving in the opposite direction that it is facing

fields.name: researchCostMultiplier
fields.notes: multiplier for cost of research in tech tree

fields.name: groundLayer
fields.notes: for ground units, the layer upon which this unit is drawn

fields.name: flyingLayer
fields.notes: For units that fly, the layer upon which this unit is drawn. If no value is set, defaults to Layer.flyingUnitLow or Layer.flyingUnit depending on lowAltitude

fields.name: payloadCapacity
fields.notes: Payload capacity of this unit in world units^2

fields.name: buildSpeed
fields.notes: building speed multiplier; <0 to disable.

fields.name: aimDst
fields.notes: Minimum distance from this unit that weapons can target. Prevents units from firing "inside" the unit.

fields.name: buildBeamOffset
fields.notes: Visual offset of the build beam from the front.

fields.name: mineBeamOffset
fields.notes: Visual offset of the mining beam from the front. Defaults to half the hitsize.

fields.name: targetPriority
fields.notes: WIP: Units of low priority will always be ignored in favor of those with higher priority, regardless of distance.

fields.name: shadowElevation
fields.notes: Elevation of shadow drawn under this (ground) unit. Visual only.

fields.name: shadowElevationScl
fields.notes: Scale for length of shadow drawn under this unit. Does nothing if this unit has no shadow.

fields.name: engineOffset
fields.notes: backwards engine offset from center of unit

fields.name: engineSize
fields.notes: main engine radius

fields.name: engineLayer
fields.notes: layer of all engines (<0 for default)

fields.name: itemOffsetY
fields.notes: visual backwards offset of items on unit

fields.name: lightRadius
fields.notes: radius of light emitted, <0 for default

fields.name: lightOpacity
fields.notes: light color opacity

fields.name: softShadowScl
fields.notes: scale of soft shadow - its size is calculated based off of region size

fields.name: fogRadius
fields.notes: fog view radius in tiles. <0 for automatic radius.

fields.name: waveTrailX
fields.notes: horizontal offset of wave trail in naval units

fields.name: waveTrailY
fields.notes: vertical offset of wave trail in naval units

fields.name: trailScl
fields.notes: width of all trails (including naval ones)

fields.name: isEnemy
fields.notes: if true, this unit counts as an enemy in the wave counter (usually false for support-only units)

fields.name: flying
fields.notes: if true, the unit is always at elevation 1

fields.name: wobble
fields.notes: whether this flying unit should wobble around

fields.name: targetAir
fields.notes: whether this unit tries to attack air units

fields.name: targetGround
fields.notes: whether this unit tries to attack ground units

fields.name: faceTarget
fields.notes: if true, this unit will attempt to face its target when shooting/aiming at it

fields.name: circleTarget
fields.notes: AI flag: if true, this flying unit circles around its target like a bomber

fields.name: autoDropBombs
fields.notes: AI flag: if true, this unit will drop bombs under itself even when it is not next to its 'real' target. used for carpet bombers

fields.name: targetBuildingsMobile
fields.notes: For the mobile version only: If false, this unit will not auto-target buildings to attach when a player controls it.

fields.name: canBoost
fields.notes: if true, this unit can boost into the air if a player/processors controls it

fields.name: boostWhenBuilding
fields.notes: if true, this unit will always boost when using builder AI

fields.name: boostWhenMining
fields.notes: if true, this unit will always boost when using miner AI

fields.name: logicControllable
fields.notes: if false, logic processors cannot control this unit

fields.name: playerControllable
fields.notes: if false, players cannot control this unit

fields.name: controlSelectGlobal
fields.notes: If true, the unit can be selected with the global selection hotkey (shift+g).

fields.name: allowedInPayloads
fields.notes: if false, this unit cannot be moved into payloads

fields.name: hittable
fields.notes: if false, this unit cannot be hit by bullets or explosions

fields.name: killable
fields.notes: if false, this unit does not take damage and cannot be kill() / destroy()-ed.

fields.name: targetable
fields.notes: if false, this unit is not targeted by anything.

fields.name: vulnerableWithPayloads
fields.notes: if true, this unit can be hit/targeted when it has payloads (assuming hittable/targetable is false)

fields.name: pickupUnits
fields.notes: if true, this payload unit can pick up units

fields.name: physics
fields.notes: if false, this unit does not physically collide with others.

fields.name: canDrown
fields.notes: if true, this ground unit will drown in deep liquids.

fields.name: useUnitCap
fields.notes: if false, this unit ignores the unit cap and can be spawned infinitely

fields.name: coreUnitDock
fields.notes: if true, this core unit will "dock" to other units, making it re-appear when "undocking".

fields.name: createWreck
fields.notes: if false, no falling "corpse" is created when this unit dies.

fields.name: createScorch
fields.notes: if false, no scorch marks are created when this unit dies

fields.name: lowAltitude
fields.notes: if true, this unit will be drawn under effects/bullets; this is a visual change only.

fields.name: rotateToBuilding
fields.notes: if true, this unit will look at whatever it is building

fields.name: allowLegStep
fields.notes: if true and this is a legged unit, this unit can walk over blocks.

fields.name: legPhysicsLayer
fields.notes: for legged units, setting this to false forces it to be on the ground physics layer.

fields.name: hovering
fields.notes: if true, this unit will not be affected by the floor under it.

fields.name: omniMovement
fields.notes: if true, this unit can move in any direction regardless of rotation. if false, this unit can only move in the direction it is facing.

fields.name: rotateMoveFirst
fields.notes: if true, the unit faces its moving direction before actually moving.

fields.name: healFlash
fields.notes: if true, this unit flashes when being healed

fields.name: canHeal
fields.notes: whether the unit can heal blocks. Initialized in init()

fields.name: singleTarget
fields.notes: if true, all weapons will attack the same target.

fields.name: forceMultiTarget
fields.notes: if true, this unit will be able to have multiple targets, even if it only has one mirrored weapon.

fields.name: canAttack
fields.notes: if false, this unit has no weapons that can attack.

fields.name: hidden
fields.notes: if true, this unit won't show up in the database or various other UIs.

fields.name: internal
fields.notes: if true, this unit is for internal use only and does not have a sprite generated.

fields.name: internalGenerateSprites
fields.notes: For certain units, generating sprites is still necessary, despite being internal.

fields.name: bounded
fields.notes: If false, this unit is not pushed away from map edges.

fields.name: naval
fields.notes: if true, this unit is detected as naval - do NOT assign this manually! Initialized in init()

fields.name: autoFindTarget
fields.notes: if false, RTS AI controlled units do not automatically attack things while moving. This is automatically assigned.

fields.name: targetUnderBlocks
fields.notes: If false, 'under' blocks like conveyors are not targeted.

fields.name: alwaysShootWhenMoving
fields.notes: if true, this unit will always shoot while moving regardless of slowdown

fields.name: hoverable
fields.notes: whether this unit has a hover tooltip

fields.name: alwaysCreateOutline
fields.notes: if true, this modded unit always has a -outline region generated for its base. Normally, outlines are ignored if there are no top = false weapons.

fields.name: generateFullIcon
fields.notes: for vanilla content only - if false, skips the full icon generation step.

fields.name: squareShape
fields.notes: if true, this unit has a square shadow.

fields.name: drawBuildBeam
fields.notes: if true, this unit will draw its building beam towards blocks.

fields.name: drawMineBeam
fields.notes: if true, this unit will draw its mining beam towards blocks

fields.name: drawCell
fields.notes: if false, the team indicator/cell is not drawn.

fields.name: drawItems
fields.notes: if false, carried items are not drawn.

fields.name: drawShields
fields.notes: if false, the unit shield (usually seen in waves) is not drawn.

fields.name: drawBody
fields.notes: if false, the unit body is not drawn.

fields.name: drawSoftShadow
fields.notes: if false, the soft shadow is not drawn.

fields.name: drawMinimap
fields.notes: if false, the unit is not drawn on the minimap.

fields.name: aiController
fields.notes: The default AI controller to assign on creation.

fields.name: controller
fields.notes: Function that chooses AI controller based on unit entity.

fields.name: constructor
fields.notes: Creates a new instance of this unit class.

fields.name: abilities
fields.notes: list of "abilities", which are various behaviors that update each frame

fields.name: weapons
fields.notes: All weapons that this unit will shoot with.

fields.name: immunities
fields.notes: None of the status effects in this set can be applied to this unit.

fields.name: healColor
fields.notes: color that this unit flashes when getting healed (if healFlash is true)

fields.name: lightColor
fields.notes: Color of light that this unit produces when lighting is enabled in the map.

fields.name: shieldColor
fields.notes: override for unit shield colour.

fields.name: deathSound
fields.notes: sound played when this unit explodes (not when it is shot down)

fields.name: deathSoundVolume
fields.notes: volume of death sound

fields.name: wreckSound
fields.notes: sound played when the unit wreck is shot down

fields.name: wreckSoundVolume
fields.notes: volume of wreck falling sound

fields.name: loopSound
fields.notes: sound played on loop when this unit is around.

fields.name: loopSoundVolume
fields.notes: volume of loop sound

fields.name: stepSound
fields.notes: sound played when this mech/insect unit does a step

fields.name: stepSoundVolume
fields.notes: volume of step sound

fields.name: stepSoundPitch
fields.notes: base pitch of step sound

fields.name: stepSoundPitchRange
fields.notes: base pitch of step sound

fields.name: tankMoveSound
fields.notes: sound looped when tank moves

fields.name: moveSound
fields.notes: sound looped when the unit moves; volume depends on velocity

fields.name: moveSoundVolume
fields.notes: volume of movement sound

fields.name: moveSoundPitchMin
fields.notes: pitch of movement sound based on velocity

fields.name: moveSoundPitchMax
fields.notes: pitch of movement sound based on velocity

fields.name: tankMoveVolume
fields.notes: volume of tank move sfx

fields.name: fallEffect
fields.notes: effect that this unit emits when falling

fields.name: fallEngineEffect
fields.notes: effect created at engine when unit falls.

fields.name: deathExplosionEffect
fields.notes: effect created when this unit dies

fields.name: treadEffect
fields.notes: optional effect created when this tank moves

fields.name: parts
fields.notes: extra (usually animated) visual parts

fields.name: engines
fields.notes: list of engines, or "thrusters"

fields.name: useEngineElevation
fields.notes: if false, the thruster is always displayed at its normal size regardless of elevation

fields.name: engineColor
fields.notes: override for all engine colors

fields.name: engineColorInner
fields.notes: color for inner portions of engines

fields.name: trailLength
fields.notes: length of engine trail (if flying) or wave trail (if naval)

fields.name: trailColor
fields.notes: override for engine trail color

fields.name: flowfieldPathType
fields.notes: Cost type ID for flow field/enemy AI pathfinding.

fields.name: pathCost
fields.notes: Function used for calculating cost of moving with ControlPathfinder. Does not affect "normal" flow field pathfinding.

fields.name: pathCostId
fields.notes: ID for path cost, to be used in the control path finder. This is the value that actually matters; do not assign manually. Set in init().

fields.name: sample
fields.notes: A sample of the unit that this type creates. Do not modify!

fields.name: targetFlags
fields.notes: Flags to target based on priority. Null indicates that the closest target should be found. The closest enemy core is used as a fallback.

fields.name: allowChangeCommands
fields.notes: A value of false is used to hide command changing UI in unit factories.

fields.name: commands
fields.notes: Commands available to this unit through RTS controls. An empty array means commands will be assigned based on unit capabilities in init().

fields.name: defaultCommand
fields.notes: Command to assign to this unit upon creation. Null indicates the first command in the array.

fields.name: stances
fields.notes: Stances this unit can have.  An empty array means stances will be assigned based on unit capabilities in init().

fields.name: outlineColor
fields.notes: color for outline generated around sprites

fields.name: outlineRadius
fields.notes: thickness for sprite outline

fields.name: outlines
fields.notes: if false, no sprite outlines are generated

fields.name: itemCapacity
fields.notes: amount of items this unit can carry; <0 to determine based on hitSize.

fields.name: ammoCapacity
fields.notes: amount of ammo this unit can hold (if the rule is enabled); <0 to determine based on weapon fire rate.

fields.name: ammoType
fields.notes: ammo this unit uses, if that system is enabled.

fields.name: mineTier
fields.notes: max hardness of ore that this unit can mine (<0 to disable)

fields.name: mineSpeed
fields.notes: mining speed in weird arbitrary units

fields.name: mineWalls
fields.notes: whether this unit can mine ores from floors/walls, respectively

fields.name: mineFloor
fields.notes: whether this unit can mine ores from floors/walls, respectively

fields.name: mineHardnessScaling
fields.notes: if true, harder materials will take longer to mine
