fields.name: mineSound
fields.notes: continuous sound emitted when mining.

fields.name: mineSoundVolume
fields.notes: volume of mining sound.

fields.name: mineItems
fields.notes: Target items to mine. Used in MinerAI

fields.name: legCount
fields.notes: number of legs this unit has (must have the correct type to function!)

fields.name: legGroupSize
fields.notes: size of groups in which legs move. for example, insects (6 legs) usually move legs in groups of 3.

fields.name: legLength
fields.notes: total length of a leg (both segments)

fields.name: legSpeed
fields.notes: how fast individual legs move towards their destination (non-linear)

fields.name: legForwardScl
fields.notes: scale for how far in front (relative to unit velocity) legs try to place themselves; if legs lag behind a unit, increase this number

fields.name: legBaseOffset
fields.notes: leg offset from the center of the unit

fields.name: legMoveSpace
fields.notes: scaling for space between leg movements

fields.name: legExtension
fields.notes: for legs without "joints", this is how much the second leg sprite is moved "back" by, so it covers the joint region (it's hard to explain without an image)

fields.name: legPairOffset
fields.notes: Higher values of this field make groups of legs move less in-sync with each other.

fields.name: legLengthScl
fields.notes: scaling for how far away legs try to be from the body (not their actual length); e.g. if set to 0.5, legs will appear somewhat folded

fields.name: legStraightLength
fields.notes: if legStraightness > 0, this is the scale for how far away legs are from the body horizontally

fields.name: legMaxLength
fields.notes: maximum length of an individual leg as fraction of real length

fields.name: legMinLength
fields.notes: minimum length of an individual leg as fraction of real length

fields.name: legSplashDamage
fields.notes: splash damage dealt when a leg touches the ground

fields.name: legSplashRange
fields.notes: splash damage radius of legs

fields.name: baseLegStraightness
fields.notes: how straight the leg base/origin is (0 = circular, 1 = line)

fields.name: legStraightness
fields.notes: how straight the leg outward angles are (0 = circular, 1 = horizontal line)

fields.name: legBaseUnder
fields.notes: If true, the base (further away) leg region is drawn under instead of over.

fields.name: lockLegBase
fields.notes: If true, legs are locked to the base of the unit instead of being on an implicit rotating "mount".

fields.name: legContinuousMove
fields.notes: If true, legs always try to move around even when the unit is not moving (leads to more natural behavior)

fields.name: flipBackLegs
fields.notes: TODO neither of these appear to do much

fields.name: flipLegSide
fields.notes: TODO neither of these appear to do much

fields.name: emitWalkSound
fields.notes: Whether to emit a splashing noise in water.

fields.name: emitWalkEffect
fields.notes: Whether to emit a splashing effect in water (fasle implies emitWalkSound false).

fields.name: mechLandShake
fields.notes: screen shake amount for when this mech lands after boosting

fields.name: mechSideSway
fields.notes: parameters for mech swaying animation

fields.name: mechFrontSway
fields.notes: parameters for mech swaying animation

fields.name: mechStride
fields.notes: parameters for mech swaying animation

fields.name: mechStepParticles
fields.notes: whether particles are created when this mech takes a step

fields.name: mechLegColor
fields.notes: color that legs change to when moving, to simulate depth

fields.name: treadRects
fields.notes: list of treads as rectangles in IMAGE COORDINATES, relative to the center. these are mirrored.

fields.name: treadFrames
fields.notes: number of frames of movement in a tread

fields.name: treadPullOffset
fields.notes: how much of a top part of a tread sprite is "cut off" relative to the pattern; this is corrected for

fields.name: crushFragile
fields.notes: if true, 'fragile' blocks will instantly be crushed in a 1x1 area around the tank

fields.name: segments
fields.notes: number of independent segments

fields.name: segmentUnits
fields.notes: TODO wave support - for multi-unit segmented units, this is the number of independent units that are spawned

fields.name: segmentUnit
fields.notes: unit spawned in segments; if null, the same unit is used

fields.name: segmentEndUnit
fields.notes: unit spawned at the end; if null, the segment unit is used

fields.name: segmentLayerOrder
fields.notes: true - parent segments are on higher layers; false - parent segments are on lower layers than head

fields.name: segmentMag
fields.notes: magnitude of sine offset between segments

fields.name: segmentScl
fields.notes: scale of sine offset between segments

fields.name: segmentPhase
fields.notes: index multiplier of sine offset between segments

fields.name: segmentRotSpeed
fields.notes: how fast each segment moves towards the next one

fields.name: segmentMaxRot
fields.notes: maximum difference between segment angles

fields.name: segmentSpacing
fields.notes: spacing between separate unit segments (only used for multi-unit worms)

fields.name: segmentRotationRange
fields.notes: rotation between segments is clamped to this range

fields.name: crawlSlowdown
fields.notes: speed multiplier this unit will have when crawlSlowdownFrac is met.

fields.name: crushDamage
fields.notes: damage dealt to blocks under this tank/crawler every frame.

fields.name: crawlSlowdownFrac
fields.notes: the fraction of solids under this block necessary for it to reach crawlSlowdown.

fields.name: lifetime
fields.notes: lifetime of this missile.

fields.name: homingDelay
fields.notes: ticks that must pass before this missile starts homing.

fields.name: unstableSpeed
fields.notes: How quickly instability moves towards 1, per frame.

fields.name: lightningChance
fields.notes: Lighting chance. -1 to disable

fields.name: chanceDeflect
fields.notes: Bullet deflection chance. -1 to disable

fields.name: drillTime
fields.notes: Time to produce one item at 100% efficiency.

fields.name: liquidBoostIntensity
fields.notes: How many times faster the drill will progress when boosted by liquid.

fields.name: updateEffect
fields.notes: Effect randomly played while drilling.

fields.name: attribute
fields.notes: Attribute to check for wall output.

fields.name: itemBoostIntensity
fields.notes: How many times faster the drill will progress when boosted by items. Note: Using item and liquid boosters at once is not supported.

fields.name: name
fields.notes: displayed weapon region

fields.name: bullet
fields.notes: bullet shot

fields.name: ejectEffect
fields.notes: shell ejection effect

fields.name: display
fields.notes: whether weapon should appear in the stats of a unit with this weapon

fields.name: useAmmo
fields.notes: whether to consume ammo when ammo is enabled in rules

fields.name: mirror
fields.notes: whether to create a flipped copy of this weapon upon initialization. default: true

fields.name: flipSprite
fields.notes: whether to flip the weapon's sprite when rendering. internal use only - do not set!

fields.name: alternate
fields.notes: whether to shoot the weapons in different arms one after another, rather than all at once; only valid when mirror = true

fields.name: rotate
fields.notes: whether to rotate toward the target independently of unit

fields.name: showStatSprite
fields.notes: Whether to show the sprite of the weapon in the database.

fields.name: baseRotation
fields.notes: rotation at which this weapon starts at.

fields.name: top
fields.notes: whether to draw the outline on top.

fields.name: continuous
fields.notes: whether to hold the bullet in place while firing; it will still require reload.

fields.name: alwaysContinuous
fields.notes: whether this weapon uses continuous fire without reloading; implies continuous = true

fields.name: aimChangeSpeed
fields.notes: Speed at which the turret can change its bullet "aim" distance. This is only used for point laser bullets.

fields.name: controllable
fields.notes: whether this weapon can be aimed manually by players

fields.name: aiControllable
fields.notes: whether this weapon can be automatically aimed by the unit

fields.name: alwaysShooting
fields.notes: whether this weapon is always shooting, regardless of targets ore cone

fields.name: autoTarget
fields.notes: whether to automatically target relevant units in update(); only works when controllable = false.

fields.name: predictTarget
fields.notes: whether to perform target trajectory prediction

fields.name: useAttackRange
fields.notes: if true, this weapon is used for attack range calculations

fields.name: targetInterval
fields.notes: ticks to wait in-between targets

fields.name: targetSwitchInterval
fields.notes: ticks to wait in-between targets

fields.name: rotateSpeed
fields.notes: rotation speed of weapon when rotation is enabled, in degrees/t

fields.name: reload
fields.notes: weapon reload in frames

fields.name: inaccuracy
fields.notes: inaccuracy of degrees of each shot

fields.name: shake
fields.notes: intensity and duration of each shot's screen shake

fields.name: recoil
fields.notes: visual weapon knockback.

fields.name: recoils
fields.notes: Number of additional counters for recoil.

fields.name: recoilTime
fields.notes: time taken for weapon to return to starting position in ticks. uses reload time by default

fields.name: recoilPow
fields.notes: power curve applied to visual recoil

fields.name: cooldownTime
fields.notes: ticks to cool down the heat region

fields.name: shootX
fields.notes: projectile/effect offsets from center of weapon

fields.name: shootY
fields.notes: projectile/effect offsets from center of weapon

fields.name: x
fields.notes: offsets of weapon position on unit

fields.name: y
fields.notes: offsets of weapon position on unit

fields.name: xRand
fields.notes: Random spread on the X/Y axis.

fields.name: yRand
fields.notes: Random spread on the X/Y axis.

fields.name: shoot
fields.notes: pattern used for bullets

fields.name: shadow
fields.notes: radius of shadow drawn under the weapon; <0 to disable

fields.name: velocityRnd
fields.notes: fraction of velocity that is random

fields.name: extraVelocity
fields.notes: extra velocity that is added as a fraction

fields.name: shootCone
fields.notes: The half-radius of the cone in which shooting will start.

fields.name: rotationLimit
fields.notes: Cone in which the weapon can rotate relative to its mount.

fields.name: minWarmup
fields.notes: minimum weapon warmup before firing (this is not linear, do NOT use 1!)

fields.name: shootWarmupSpeed
fields.notes: lerp speed for shoot warmup, only used for parts

fields.name: smoothReloadSpeed
fields.notes: lerp speed for shoot warmup, only used for parts

fields.name: linearWarmup
fields.notes: If true, shoot warmup is linear instead of a curve.

fields.name: soundPitchMin
fields.notes: random sound pitch range

fields.name: soundPitchMax
fields.notes: random sound pitch range

fields.name: ignoreRotation
fields.notes: whether shooter rotation is ignored when shooting.

fields.name: noAttack
fields.notes: If true, this weapon cannot be used to attack targets.

fields.name: minShootVelocity
fields.notes: min velocity required for this weapon to shoot

fields.name: parentizeEffects
fields.notes: should the shoot effects follow the unit (effects need followParent set to true for this to work)

fields.name: otherSide
fields.notes: internal value used for alternation - do not change!

fields.name: layerOffset
fields.notes: draw Z offset relative to the default value

fields.name: activeSound
fields.notes: sound looped when shooting

fields.name: activeSoundVolume
fields.notes: volume of active sound

fields.name: shootSound
fields.notes: sound used for shooting

fields.name: shootSoundVolume
fields.notes: volume of the shoot sound

fields.name: initialShootSound
fields.notes: sound used when this weapon first fires; for continuous weapons only

fields.name: chargeSound
fields.notes: sound used for weapons that have a delay

fields.name: region
fields.notes: displayed region (autoloaded)

fields.name: heatRegion
fields.notes: heat region, must be same size as region (optional)

fields.name: cellRegion
fields.notes: cell region, must be same size as region (optional)

fields.name: outlineRegion
fields.notes: outline region to display if top is false

fields.name: heatColor
fields.notes: heat region tint

fields.name: shootStatus
fields.notes: status effect applied when shooting

fields.name: mountType
fields.notes: type of weapon mount to be used

fields.name: shootStatusDuration
fields.notes: status effect duration when shot

fields.name: shootOnDeath
fields.notes: whether this weapon should fire when its owner dies

fields.name: shootOnDeathEffect
fields.notes: If not null and shootOnDeath == true, overrides the weapon's shoot effect only when its owner dies.

fields.name: parts
fields.notes: extra animated parts

fields.name: duration
fields.notes: Default duration of this weather event in ticks.
